CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Do not change this field or hide it from the layout. Automatically calculated. Buyer's Total Investment at Closing minus Pre-paids/Reserves. This formula was updated in 1.10 to use the new field, Buyer's Total Investment at Closing, instead of the old one, Buyer's Total Cash Investment, which was made obsolete and renamed to Buyer's Total Cash Investment (OLD).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Automatically calculated. Buyer's Total Investment at Closing minus Pre-paids/Reserves.
CustomField.label: Buyer's Initial Cash Equity
